metadata.name: Request Camera Equipment from Gear Closet

description: A video journalist needs to check out a specific camera, lens, and microphone for an upcoming shoot.

nodes.task_description: Access the newsroom's equipment booking system.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent is logged into the booking system.

nodes.task_description: Check the availability of the required camera, lens, and microphone for the dates of the shoot.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the gear is available.

nodes.task_description: Reserve the equipment under their name for the specified dates.
